basic_details.short_information: Andrew Yule & Company (AYCL) Consultant (Hindi) Notification 2026 has been released on 09 May 2026 on the official website of Andrew Yule & Company (AYCL). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AYCL Consultant (Hindi) Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 64 years who have a Master’s degree in Hindi or English with relevant translation/official language experience are eligible to apply for these Consultant (Hindi) vacancies. The offline application process for AYCL Consultant (Hindi) Recruitment 2026 has started on 09 May 2026 and will remain open until 31 May

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Hindi or English with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Master's degree from a recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level OR Master's degree from a recognized University in English with Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level. Minimum 5 years’ experience in Central/State Government/PSUs/other Government bodies as Hindi Translator/Hindi Officer or in related Official Language work/ translation from Hindi to English and vice versa.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AYCL Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AYCL Consultant (Hindi) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the AYCL Consultant (Hindi) recruitment is 31 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Hindi) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant (Hindi) post in Andrew Yule & Company.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (Hindi) post?
faq.answer: A Master's degree in Hindi or English with English or Hindi as a compulsory/elective subject, along with relevant experience, is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Consultant (Hindi) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant (Hindi) position is 64 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Hindi) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant (Hindi) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant (Hindi) post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: Andrew Yule & Company (AYCL) is conducting this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Consultant (Hindi) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Consultant (Hindi) position is Contractual.
